_meta.derivation: earliest commit per author_login from commits.json; enrich via /commits/{sha} for files/stats

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 2.8.3)
+project(rtcm_msgs)
+
+find_package(catkin REQUIRED COMPONENTS std_msgs message_generation)
+
+add_message_files(
+  FILES
+  Message.msg
+)
+
+generate_messages(
+  DEPENDENCIES
+  std_msgs
+)
+
+catkin_package(CATKIN_DEPENDS std_msgs message_runtime)

@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+# A message representing a single RTCM message.
+Header header
+
+uint8[] message
+

@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+<?xml version="1.0"?>
+<package>
+  <name>rtcm_msgs</name>
+  <version>1.0.0</version>
+  <description>The rtcm_msgs package contains messages related to data in the RTCM format.</description>
+  <maintainer email="tilk@tilk.eu">Marek Materzok</maintainer>
+  <license>BSD</license>
+  <author email="tilk@tilk.eu">Marek Materzok</author>
+
+  <buildtool_depend>catkin</buildtool_depend>
+  <build_depend>std_msgs</build_depend>
+  <build_depend>message_generation</build_depend>
+  <run_depend>std_msgs</run_depend>
+  <run_depend>message_runtime</run_depend>
+
+  <export>
+  </export>
+</package>

data.author: clalancette
data.message:
Add in a dependency on ament_lint_common for ROS 2.

This is because we have the linter tests enabled, which
require ament_lint_common.

Signed-off-by: Chris Lalancette <clalancette@openrobotics.org>

files.patch:
@@ -1,16 +1,38 @@
-cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 2.8.3)
+cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.5)
 project(rtcm_msgs)
 
-find_package(catkin REQUIRED COMPONENTS std_msgs message_generation)
+find_package(ros_environment REQUIRED)
 
-add_message_files(
-  FILES
-  Message.msg
-)
+set(ROS_VERSION $ENV{ROS_VERSION})
 
-generate_messages(
-  DEPENDENCIES
-  std_msgs
-)
+find_package(std_msgs REQUIRED)
 
-catkin_package(CATKIN_DEPENDS std_msgs message_runtime)
+if(${ROS_VERSION} EQUAL 1)
+
+  find_package(catkin REQUIRED
+    COMPONENTS
+      message_generation
+  )
+
+  add_message_files(DIRECTORY msg
+    FILES
+      Message.msg
+  )
+
+  generate_messages(DEPENDENCIES std_msgs)
+
+  catkin_package(CATKIN_DEPENDS message_runtime std_msgs)
+
+elseif(${ROS_VERSION} EQUAL 2)
+  find_package(ament_cmake REQUIRED)
+  find_package(builtin_interfaces REQUIRED)
+  find_package(rosidl_default_generators REQUIRED)
+
+  rosidl_generate_interfaces(${PROJECT_NAME} ADD_LINTER_TESTS
+    msg/Message.msg
+  )
+
+  ament_export_dependencies(rosidl_default_runtime)
+  ament_package()
+
+endif()

@@ -1,5 +1,4 @@
 # A message representing a single RTCM message.
-Header header
+std_msgs/Header header
 
 uint8[] message
-

@@ -1,18 +1,31 @@
 <?xml version="1.0"?>
-<package>
+<?xml-model
+  href="http://download.ros.org/schema/package_format3.xsd"
+  schematypens="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"?>
+<package format="3">
   <name>rtcm_msgs</name>
   <version>1.0.0</version>
   <description>The rtcm_msgs package contains messages related to data in the RTCM format.</description>
   <maintainer email="tilk@tilk.eu">Marek Materzok</maintainer>
   <license>BSD</license>
   <author email="tilk@tilk.eu">Marek Materzok</author>
 
-  <buildtool_depend>catkin</buildtool_depend>
-  <build_depend>std_msgs</build_depend>
-  <build_depend>message_generation</build_depend>
-  <run_depend>std_msgs</run_depend>
-  <run_depend>message_runtime</run_depend>
+  <buildtool_depend condition="$ROS_VERSION == 1">catkin</buildtool_depend>
+  <buildtool_depend condition="$ROS_VERSION == 2">ament_cmake</buildtool_depend>
+  <buildtool_depend condition="$ROS_VERSION == 2">rosidl_default_generators</buildtool_depend>
+
+  <build_depend condition="$ROS_VERSION == 1">message_generation</build_depend>
+  <build_depend>ros_environment</build_depend>
+
+  <depend>std_msgs</depend>
+
+  <exec_depend condition="$ROS_VERSION == 1">message_runtime</exec_depend>
+
+  <member_of_group condition="$ROS_VERSION == 2">rosidl_interface_packages</member_of_group>
 
   <export>
+    <build_type condition="$ROS_VERSION == 1">catkin</build_type>
+    <build_type condition="$ROS_VERSION == 2">ament_cmake</build_type>
   </export>
+
 </package>
